emails.subject: Media General
emails.body: Tana, We are needing a quick Legal blessing for Media General today. Tom should be emailing us today but I wanted you to know before this. Media General, Inc. 333 East Grace Street Richmond, VA CPID 79935 Let me know if you need more details. Thanks! Camille
